sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n106721" key="u(mnobruh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑμνο-βρῠής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n106721.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">full of hymns,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">χώρα</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0205.tlg001:19" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Philod.Scarph.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">19</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
